summary: Completed frontend testing of the Notes (Notas) share modal fix in Victoria Eventos wedding planning app. All share functionality is working correctly - the new share modal replaces the previous broken window.open approach that was blocked by browser sandboxing.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warning in console
design_issues.note: Accessibility warning from Radix UI - doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Share button (Send icon) appears on notes
'Copiar al portapapeles' button visible with correct Spanish text
Copy button changes to 'Copiado' confirmation after click
Check icon appears after successful copy
Toast notification 'Texto copiado al portapapeles' displays
Copy button resets to original state after timeout
WhatsApp Web link visible with text 'Enviar por WhatsApp Web'
Email link visible with text 'Enviar por Email'
Email link has correct mailto: href format
Modal can be closed via X button
critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding aria-describedby to DialogContent to fix accessibility warning
context_for_next_testing_agent: The share modal fix for Notes module is complete and working. The modal opens from a Send icon button next to each note, displays the note content, and provides 3 sharing options: copy to clipboard (with visual feedback), WhatsApp Web link, and Email link. All UI text is in Spanish as expected. Minor accessibility warning about DialogContent missing aria-describedby.
